report_name: Indian Finance Minister Warns of AI-Driven Cyberattacks and Deepfakes Threatening Financial Markets

identities.name: Nirmala Sitharaman
identities.description: India's Union Finance Minister who warned of AI-driven cyber threats and deepfakes targeting the country's financial markets during an address to SEBI.

identities.name: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
identities.description: India's capital markets regulator, which was urged by the Finance Minister to enhance cybersecurity defenses against emerging threats like AI-led attacks and deepfakes.

identities.name: Government of India
identities.description: The national government of India, represented by the Finance Minister, directing the country's financial regulators to bolster cyber defenses.

relationships.source_name: Securities and Exchange Board of India (SEBI)
